summary: Local `main` was fast-forwarded from `61c7d55` to `77c1440` to match `origin/main`. Transient `.control-tower` operational artifacts were temporarily stashed with `git stash push -u`, restored with `git stash pop --index`, and remain uncommitted in the working tree.
work_completed: Inspected `main` worktree status and identified modified and untracked transient `.control-tower` operational artifacts.
Fetched `origin/main` and confirmed local `main` was behind by 10 commits.
Temporarily stashed `.control-tower` tracked and untracked operational artifacts for pull hygiene.
Fast-forwarded local `main` to `origin/main` with `git pull --ff-only origin main`.
Restored the transient `.control-tower` artifacts after the sync and verified `main` is now up to date with `origin/main`.

findings.message: Pulled commit range: `92e8f69`, `3ebd054`, `a201363`, `1f5d524`, `129939b`, `e12ed7d`, `953b599`, `8dbd799`, `78b38e2`, ending at merge commit `77c1440`.
Temporary stash used: `git-master sync main transient control-tower artifacts`; it was successfully dropped after `git stash pop --index` restored the local operational files.
The working tree still contains uncommitted transient `.control-tower` changes and packet artifacts by design, including modified memory/state files and untracked outbox/session files.

follow_up_recommendations: Leave the current `.control-tower` working tree changes uncommitted unless a separate operational task explicitly needs them versioned.
If a clean working tree is needed for later repository operations, repeat the same stash-and-restore pattern scoped to `.control-tower/`.
memory_worthy: Local `main` now matches `origin/main` at `77c1440` after PR #17 merge.
Transient `.control-tower` operational artifacts required a temporary stash during sync and were restored afterward without being committed.
